race.comment: Competitive. OFF THE SCALE (1) was quickly back on track, scoring by a nose over today's course and distance. Has the handy 2kg claim and is nicely placed to go on with the job. TALANA (2) registered a strong win at Port Macquarie before being well positioned in the run, beaten just 0.6 lengths here by the above. Keeps the 3kg claim and he should be right in it again. CLUBMAN (3) resumed over 1600m at Newcastle and needed the outing. Has more to give and is proven second-up. Has the blinkers on again and will keep improving for a top yard. AMARONE (4) races on pace and presents off an easy 58 win over this distance at Tuncurry, bet into $2 favouritism. Has weight relief and will use the inside gate. Has genuine claims as well.
